Project.NAME: Mole
Project.keywords: macOS, system-maintenance, disk-cleanup, optimization, bash, cli, ai-advisor, llm-integration, openai-compatible, interactive-menu, safe-deletion
Project.annotation: macOS system maintenance CLI with AI-powered advisor. Disk cleanup, optimization, health checks, uninstall management, and LLM-driven interactive system analysis with risk-tagged cleanup recommendations.

M-BASE.NAME: Base
M-BASE.purpose: Fundamental constants, colors, icons, platform detection, byte conversion utilities

M-COMMON.NAME: Common
M-COMMON.purpose: Source-chain loader bringing in all core modules. Provides update flow and shared initialization.

notes.note-1: Contains set -euo pipefail that affects all downstream sources.

M-FILE-OPS.NAME: File Operations
M-FILE-OPS.purpose: safe_remove, validate_path_for_deletion, path size measurement. Trusted deletion pipeline.

fn-safe_remove.PURPOSE: Validate and delete a path with rm -rf

fn-validate_path_for_deletion.PURPOSE: Check path against protected patterns, SIP, traversal attempts

M-UI.NAME: UI
M-UI.purpose: Terminal UI primitives: read_key, hide/show cursor, spinner, drain_pending_input

M-APP-PROTECTION.NAME: App Protection
M-APP-PROTECTION.purpose: should_protect_path — validates paths against system-critical and user-critical patterns

fn-should_protect_path.PURPOSE: Return 0 if path is protected from deletion

M-LOG.NAME: Log
M-LOG.purpose: Logging infrastructure with levels, debug log file support

M-AI-CONFIG.NAME: AI Config
M-AI-CONFIG.purpose: Manage AI endpoint configuration stored in ~/.config/mole/ai.conf

fn-ai_config_is_configured.PURPOSE: Check if endpoint and model are set

M-AI-CLIENT.NAME: AI Client
M-AI-CLIENT.purpose: OpenAI-compatible HTTP client with standard and SSE streaming modes

fn-_build_messages_json.PURPOSE: Build JSON messages array from system + user prompts

M-AI-COLLECTOR.NAME: System Collector
M-AI-COLLECTOR.purpose: Gather system state: disk usage (user+system dirs), memory, CPU, trash, cleanable items, build artifacts, installer files, Docker/Homebrew/cache sizes, network, battery

fn-collector_run_all.PURPOSE: Run all collection sections to stdout

fn-_fast_du_sk.PURPOSE: Get directory size in KB via du -sk

fn-_fast_du_sk_bg.PURPOSE: Get directory size with background timeout guard

fn-_collect_section.PURPOSE: Output section header and call collector function

fn-_collect_disk_usage.PURPOSE: Scan user dirs, system dirs, large containers

fn-_collect_cleanable_items.PURPOSE: Cache dirs, system-level cleanable, build artifacts

M-AI-PROMPT.NAME: AI Prompt
M-AI-PROMPT.purpose: System prompt with risk taxonomy and required response format (markdown report + JSON plan)

fn-ai_system_prompt.PURPOSE: Output system prompt text to stdout

M-AI-ADVISOR.NAME: AI Advisor CLI
M-AI-ADVISOR.purpose: Main advisor command: collection, API call with retry, report rendering, interactive menu, confirmation, execution. Supports --auto-safe flag.
M-AI-ADVISOR.depends: M-AI-CONFIG, M-AI-CLIENT, M-AI-COLLECTOR, M-AI-COLLECTOR-EXT, M-AI-PROMPT, M-AI-RENDERER, M-AI-EXECUTOR, M-FILE-OPS, M-UI, M-LOG

fn-main.PURPOSE: Entry point: parse args, collect data, call AI, render report, interactive select, confirm, execute

fn-_call_ai_with_retry.PURPOSE: Call AI with up to 2 retries on failure

fn-_step_ok.PURPOSE: Show completed step with green checkmark

fn-_step_fail.PURPOSE: Show failed step with red icon

M-AI-RENDERER.NAME: AI Renderer
M-AI-RENDERER.purpose: Render AI advisor markdown report, parse JSON plan, interactive selection menu with risk filter and scrolling, confirmation prompt

fn-_render_report.PURPOSE: Parse LLM markdown and render formatted report sections

fn-_extract_json_plan.PURPOSE: Extract JSON block from LLM response (sed + python3 fallback)

fn-_parse_plan_items.PURPOSE: Parse JSON plan into pipe-delimited lines via python3

fn-_load_plan.PURPOSE: Load parsed plan into parallel arrays (_PLAN_TITLES, etc.)

fn-_show_plan_menu.PURPOSE: Render [x]/[ ] menu with risk colors, scrolling, filter label

fn-_interactive_select.PURPOSE: Keyboard-driven selection loop with F key risk filter

fn-_show_confirmation.PURPOSE: Typed yes confirmation with path listing

fn-_risk_color.PURPOSE: Return color code for risk level

fn-_update_visible_indices.PURPOSE: Recalculate visible items based on risk filter

fn-_cycle_risk_filter.PURPOSE: Cycle risk filter: empty -> SAFE -> CAUTION -> RISKY -> empty

M-AI-EXECUTOR.NAME: AI Executor
M-AI-EXECUTOR.purpose: Execute confirmed plan items via safe_remove with glob expansion and progress reporting

fn-_expand_glob_paths.PURPOSE: Expand glob patterns to actual filesystem paths

fn-_execute_plan.PURPOSE: Execute selected items via safe_remove with size tracking

M-AI-COLLECTOR-EXT.NAME: Extended Collector
M-AI-COLLECTOR-EXT.purpose: Extended system data collectors: Docker images/containers/volumes, Homebrew cache/outdated/cellar, Xcode simulators/archives/derived data

fn-_collect_docker_info.PURPOSE: Docker disk usage, images, containers, volumes

fn-_collect_homebrew_info.PURPOSE: Homebrew cache, cellar breakdown, outdated packages

fn-_collect_xcode_info.PURPOSE: Xcode simulators, derived data, archives, device support

CrossLink.relation: sources for report, plan parsing, menu, confirmation
